ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "well_type" TEXT /* Type of the well (e.g., onshore, offshore) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the well */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the well location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the well location */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the well was created */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES well_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the well model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure value */,
  "conjpos" REAL /* Conjpos value */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Drawdown value */,
  "coniapos" REAL /* Coniapos value */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth value */,
  "swat" REAL /* Swat value */,
  "conbpres" REAL /* Conbpres value */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_data_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_data" (
  "pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data point */,
  "pressure_value" REAL /* Pressure value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the pressure value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pressure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES well_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conjpos_data" (
  "conjpos_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conjpos data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data point */,
  "conjpos_value" REAL /* Conjpos value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the conjpos value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conjpos_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conjpos_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES well_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drawdown_data" (
  "drawdown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drawdown data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data point */,
  "drawdown_value" REAL /* Drawdown value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the drawdown value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drawdown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawdown_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES well_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coniapos_data" (
  "coniapos_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coniapos data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data point */,
  "coniapos_value" REAL /* Coniapos value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the coniapos value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coniapos_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coniapos_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES well_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depth_data" (
  "depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depth data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data point */,
  "depth_value" REAL /* Depth value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the depth value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depth_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES well_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "swat_data" (
  "swat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each swat data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data point */,
  "swat_value" REAL /* Swat value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the swat value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swat_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES well_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conbpres_data" (
  "conbpres_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conbpres data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data point */,
  "conbpres_value" REAL /* Conbpres value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the conbpres value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conbpres_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conbpres_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES well_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gas_composition" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gas composition data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data point */,
  "gas_type" TEXT /* Type of gas */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of gas in the composition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liquid_flow_rates" (
  "flow_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow rate data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data point */,
  "flow_rate_value" REAL /* Flow rate value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the flow rate value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, engineer, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the well */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the well was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, warning) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_parameters_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)
